name: byok
description: Bring-your-own-key credential vault + provider-connection registry. Owns modelCreds (AES-256-GCM), per-user CRUD, the OpenAI-compatible provider map, and the Providers UI.
notes: Extracted IN PLACE. Convex fns keep api.credentials.*/internal.credentials.* paths — slice.json rootPaths declares ownership without moving registered functions (avoids rewriting oauth.ts/chat.ts/callForUser.ts/chatTools.ts/page.tsx). crypto.ts helpers re-exported via convex/features/byok/index.ts (plain fns, safe). chatProviders.ts is 'use node' so it is declared, not re-exported. The Providers UI still depends on the app shared.tsx (PROVIDER_LABEL, ErrorLine) and oauth.ts actions — consumer-locked couplings to sanitize before an UP push.
